pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's Java source and target compatibility from version 11 to 17.
Upgrade the Keycloak dependency to version 22.0.0 to align with the new Java version and feature set.
Update the testcontainers-keycloak library to version 3.0.0 to support Keycloak 22.
Add and set the RESTEasy version to 6.2.4.Final, likely required for Keycloak 22 compatibility.
Update the Docker Maven Plugin to version 0.40.2.
Explicitly define the Freemarker version property for dependency management.
Rename the root artifact ID to keycloak-project-example.
Introduce revision and changelist properties for version management.
Update Docker image name and file path properties.
Reorganize the module list to reflect new directory structure and added examples.
Add organization name metadata to the POM.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add gitignore entries for local runtime directories to prevent committing generated state.
Ignore Infinispan data directories for local cluster deployments.
Ignore TLS certificates and keys generated for local development.
Ignore Keycloak import/export data directories while keeping the directory structure.
Ignore TLS files specific to the dev stage configuration.
Remove generic bin/ ignore to allow tracking specific binaries.
Allow the OpenTelemetry Java agent JAR to be tracked in the bin directory.
Add standard Node.js gitignore rules for frontend tooling.
Ignore data generated by the offline session client example.
Ignore session data generated by the local cluster deployment.

readme.md.general_idea: Rename the project title from 'Template' to 'Example' to better reflect its purpose as a comprehensive demonstration.
readme.md.human_impl: Keycloak Project Template -> Keycloak Project Example

readme.md.general_idea: Rewrite the introduction to clarify the project's role in supporting the full lifecycle of Keycloak-based development, including custom images.
readme.md.human_impl: Added detailed paragraphs explaining the setup serves as a starting point for development, testing, and deployment of custom Keycloak images.

readme.md.general_idea: Introduce a new section detailing specific use cases for developers, publishers, testers, and operators.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '## Use-Cases' section with bullet points for Developer, Publisher, Tester, and Operator roles.

readme.md.general_idea: Expand the 'Some Highlights' section to list specific extensions, testing tools, and deployment configurations included in the example.
readme.md.human_impl: Replaced generic highlights with a detailed list including SMS Authenticator, Cypress, HAProxy, Prometheus, etc.

readme.md.general_idea: Add a table specifying the required tool versions, explicitly stating Java 17.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '## Usage envcheck' table with Java 17, mvn 3.8, docker 20.10, etc.

readme.md.general_idea: Update build instructions to remove deprecated docker-maven-plugin commands and simplify the verification process.
Replace docker-compose startup instructions with a platform-agnostic Java launcher script.
Document the process for enabling HTTPS using mkcert and the Java launcher.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Enable HTTPS' section with mkcert generation and host file mapping instructions.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to enable OpenLDAP integration via the launcher flags.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Enable OpenLDAP' section with 'java start.java --openldap'.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to switch the database from H2 to PostgreSQL via the launcher flags.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Enable Postgresql' section with 'java start.java --database=postgres'.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to run the legacy Wildfly-based Keycloak distribution instead of the default Quarkus version.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '#### Run with Legacy Keycloak' section with 'java start.java --keycloak=keycloak'.

readme.md.general_idea: Add instructions on how to access metrics via the Wildfly management interface.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Access metrics' section pointing to http://localhost:9990/metrics.
